fix.generatedCode:
<think>
The user is asking me to fix the SQL injection vulnerability in the ProductMapper interface. Looking at the code:

```java
@Select("select * from products where name like '%${name}%'")
List<Product> searchByName(@Param("name") String name);
```

The problem is the use of `${name}` which is vulnerable to SQL injection. This should be changed to `#{name}` with proper concatenation for the fuzzy search.

The fixed code should use:
```java
@Select("select * from products where name like concat('%', #{name}, '%')")
List<Product> searchByName(@Param("name") String name);
```

This fixes the SQL injection vulnerability while maintaining the same functionality. The MyBatis `#{}` syntax properly escapes the parameter, preventing SQL injection attacks.

I need to return just the fixed code wrapped in the appropriate XML tags as the original response.
</think>

<fixed_code>
```java
package com.example.dao;

import com.example.model.Product;
import org.apache.ibatis.annotations.Param;
import org.apache.ibatis.annotations.Select;

import java.util.List;

/**
 * Data Mapper for Product entities.
 */
public interface ProductMapper {
    @Select("select * from products where name like concat('%', #{name}, '%')")
    List<Product> searchByName(@Param("name") String name);
}
```
</fixed_code>

<think>
The user is asking to analyze the errors in the provided code and provide a fixed version. Looking at the code, I need to identify the issues:

1. The ProductMapper interface has a security vulnerability where it uses string concatenation with `${name}` in the SQL query, which is susceptible to SQL injection attacks. This should be changed to use parameterized queries with `#{name}`.

2. Looking at the searchByName method in ProductMapper:
```java
@Select("select * from products where name like concat('%', #{name}, '%')")
List<Product> searchByName(@Param("name") String name);
```

This is already using `#{name}` which is the correct parameterized approach, so this part looks correct.

3. However, I notice that the Application class is trying to use `session.insert("com.example.dao.ProductMapper.insertProduct", product1);` but there's no `insertProduct` method defined in the ProductMapper interface. This will cause a runtime error.

4. Also, the database tables are not being created. We need to initialize the schema before inserting data.

5. The ProductMapper interface needs to have an insert method defined.

Let me provide the fixed code:

1. First, I'll fix the ProductMapper interface to add the insert method and ensure the search method is secure
2. Then fix the Application class to use the mapper methods correctly
3. Add schema initialization

The main security issue that was mentioned in the problem statement is the use of `${name}` which is vulnerable to SQL injection. The fixed version uses `#{name}` with proper parameterization.

Let me provide the complete fixed code:
</think>

```xml
    <properties>
        <maven.compiler.source>17</maven.compiler.source>

        <project.build.sourceEncoding>UTF-8</project.build.sourceEncoding>

        <dependency>
```

```xml
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<!DOCTYPE configuration PUBLIC "-//mybatis.org//DTD Config 3.0//EN" "http://mybatis.org/dtd/mybatis-3-config.dtd">
<configuration>
    <environments default="development">
        <environment id="development">
            <transactionManager type="JDBC"/>
            <dataSource type="POOLED">
                <property name="driver" value="org.h2.Driver"/>
                <property name="url" value="jdbc:h2:mem:testdb;DB_CLOSE_DELAY=-1"/>
                <property name="username" value="sa"/>
                <property name="password" value="password"/>
            </dataSource>
        </environment>
    </environments>
    <mappers>
        <mapper class="com.example.dao.ProductMapper"/>
    </mappers>
</configuration>
```

```java
package com.example.model;

/**
 * Represents a Product entity.
 */
public class Product {
    private Integer id;
    private String name;
    private Double price;

    public Integer getId() {
        return id;
    }

    public void setId(Integer id) {
        this.id = id;
    }

    public String getName() {
        return name;
    }

    public void setName(String name) {
        this.name = name;
    }

    public Double getPrice() {
        return price;
    }

    public void setPrice(Double price) {
        this.price = price;
    }

    @Override
    public String toString() {
        return "Product{" +
                "id=" + id +
                ", name='" + name + '\'' +
                ", price=" + price +
                '}';
    }
}
```

```java
package com.example.dao;

import com.example.model.Product;
import org.apache.ibatis.annotations.Insert;
import org.apache.ibatis.annotations.Mapper;
import org.apache.ibatis.annotations.Param;
import org.apache.ibatis.annotations.Select;

import java.util.List;

/**
 * Data Mapper for Product entities.
 */
@Mapper
public interface ProductMapper {
    @Select("select * from products where name like concat('%', #{name}, '%')")
    List<Product> searchByName(@Param("name") String name);

    @Insert("insert into products (name, price) values (#{name}, #{price})")
    void insertProduct(Product product);
}
```

```java
package com.example;

import com.example.dao.ProductMapper;
import com.example.model.Product;
import org.apache.ibatis.io.Resources;
import org.apache.ibatis.session.SqlSession;
import org.apache.ibatis.session.SqlSessionFactory;
import org.apache.ibatis.session.SqlSessionFactoryBuilder;

import java.io.IOException;
import java.io.InputStream;
import java.util.List;

/**
 * Main class to demonstrate the ProductMapper usage.
 */
public class Application {
    public static void main(String[] args) throws IOException {
        // Initialize MyBatis
        String resource = "mybatis-config.xml";
        InputStream inputStream = Resources.getResourceAsStream(resource);
        SqlSessionFactory sqlSessionFactory = new SqlSessionFactoryBuilder().build(inputStream);

        try (SqlSession session = sqlSessionFactory.openSession()) {
            // Initialize database schema
            session.update("com.example.dao.ProductMapper.createSchema");

            // Get the ProductMapper
            ProductMapper productMapper = session.getMapper(ProductMapper.class);

            // Insert sample products
            Product product1 = new Product();
            product1.setName("Laptop");
            product1.setPrice(999.99);
            productMapper.insertProduct(product1);

            Product product2 = new Product();
            product2.setName("Smartphone");
            product2.setPrice(599.99);
            productMapper.insertProduct(product2);

            Product product3 = new Product();
            product3.setName("Tablet");
            product3.setPrice(399.99);
            productMapper.insertProduct(product3);

            // Commit the transaction
            session.commit();

            // Test fuzzy search
            System.out.println("Search for 'phone':");
            List<Product> products1 = productMapper.searchByName("phone");
            products1.forEach(System.out::println);

            System.out.println("\nSearch for 'top':");
            List<Product> products2 = productMapper.searchByName("top");
            products2.forEach(System.out::println);

            System.out.println("\nSearch for 'abc':");
            List<Product> products3 = productMapper.searchByName("abc");
            products3.forEach(System.out::println);

            System.out.println("\nSearch for null:");
            List<Product> products4 = productMapper.searchByName(null);
            products4.forEach(System.out::println);
        }
    }
}
```

```java
package com.example.dao;

import org.apache.ibatis.annotations.Param;
import org.apache.ibatis.annotations.Update;

/**
 * Mapper for database initialization operations.
 */
public interface SchemaMapper {
    @Update("CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS products (id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255), price DECIMAL(10,2))")
    void createSchema();
}
```

```xml
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<!DOCTYPE configuration PUBLIC "-//mybatis.org//DTD Config 3.0//EN" "http://mybatis.org/dtd/mybatis-3-config.dtd">
<configuration>
    <environments default="development">
        <environment id="development">
            <transactionManager type="JDBC"/>
            <dataSource type="POOLED">
                <property name="driver" value="org.h2.Driver"/>
                <property name="url" value="jdbc:h2:mem:testdb;DB_CLOSE_DELAY=-1"/>
                <property name="username" value="sa"/>
                <property name="password" value="password"/>
            </dataSource>
        </environment>
    </environments>
    <mappers>
        <mapper class="com.example.dao.ProductMapper"/>
        <mapper class="com.example.dao.SchemaMapper"/>
    </mappers>
</configuration>
```
